CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
